name: year
description: Reference year

name: id_state
description: FIPS state code

name: id_county
description: FIPS county code, five digits (state + county); a county part of 999 means establishments not allocated to a specific county (statewide)
observations: Codes follow the vintage of each reference year, so counties that were later dissolved or renumbered (Connecticut counties before the 2022 planning regions, some Alaska boroughs, Dade County FL) are present in early years and do not match the current county directory.

name: naics
description: NAICS industry code at its published aggregation level (2 to 6 digits); vintage varies by year, see naics_version

name: naics_version
description: NAICS classification vintage the code follows (1997, 2002, 2007, 2012, 2017, 2022)

name: establishments
description: Number of establishments

name: employment
description: Number of paid employees during the week of March 12

name: employment_flag
description: Data-suppression flag marking the employment-size range of a withheld cell (1998 to 2016 suppression era)

name: employment_noise_flag
description: Noise-infusion flag for employment from 2017 onward; G, H, J indicate increasing noise, D indicates withheld

name: payroll_first_quarter
description: First-quarter payroll in current U.S. dollars

name: payroll_first_quarter_noise_flag
description: Noise-infusion flag for first-quarter payroll

name: payroll_annual
description: Annual payroll in current U.S. dollars

name: payroll_annual_noise_flag
description: Noise-infusion flag for annual payroll

name: establishments_1_4
description: Number of establishments with 1 to 4 employees

name: establishments_5_9
description: Number of establishments with 5 to 9 employees

name: establishments_10_19
description: Number of establishments with 10 to 19 employees

name: establishments_20_49
description: Number of establishments with 20 to 49 employees

name: establishments_50_99
description: Number of establishments with 50 to 99 employees

name: establishments_100_249
description: Number of establishments with 100 to 249 employees

name: establishments_250_499
description: Number of establishments with 250 to 499 employees

name: establishments_500_999
description: Number of establishments with 500 to 999 employees

name: establishments_1000

name: establishments_1000_1499

name: establishments_1500_2499
